feedback.technicalIssues: Only in one game where it froze and nothing worked. Also sometimes having to press enter to get any of the games to start
feedback.confusingParts: No everything was straightforward baring one games instructions that was confusion.
feedback.suggestions: Try putting controls closer together ie. having to use arrows on one side and then restarting the game with a random button rather than how we started game complicates it a bit
feedback.funCriteria: If I felt the challenge was attainable, if I could change how I play and learn something from it no matter if I won or not, it felt fair rather than just frustrating.
